name: Subs and Condos
description: Parcel fabric parcels sublayer queried to display current subdivision and condominium parcels, which is parcel type 5. The layer is symbolized to display subdivision and condominium parcels using the Sub or Condo Type field on the parcels attribute table. Note that there are additional types available in the Sub or Condo Type field that are not symbolized and displayed in the map.

name: Schoolboard Director Districts
description: Candidates for the District School Board must file and be elected by district in the primary election. Director District boundaries do not split precincts.

name: {{name}}
description: {{description}}

name: Sewer Districts
description: Commissioners are elected based on district boundaries by registered voter. District boundaries also help determine levy rates for tax parcels.

name: Court Districts
description: A GIS layer which defines the following.Kittitas County shall be divided into two district court districts, one of which shall comprise the following voting precincts:Hyak, Easton, Mountain, Ronald, all Roslyn precincts, Roslyn Outlying, all Cle Elum precincts, Kachess, South Cle Elum, Peoh Point, Swauk, Teanaway, and Westside and shall be named the Upper Kittitas County District Court. The other district court district shall comprise the remaining voting precincts:Damman, Dry Creek, East Sander

name: Land Use1
description:
The designated land use for a particular area is a reflection of the County's Comprehensive Plan. It is a generalized designation which may contain multiple zoning designations which fit within that category.

Land use changes are done through the Comprehensive Plan amendment process. Changes are administered annually following the BOCC public hearing and decision; usually in November or December.

name: Channel Migration Zones
description: In 2011, as part of Kittitas County's Shoreline Master Program update process, Channel Migration Zones were delineated covering waters regulated under the Kittitas County Shoreline Master Program. This dataset was used to create maps of 64 river reaches along those Shorelines. The maps can be viewed at https://www.co.kittitas.wa.us/uploads/documents/cds/smp/documents/201212-CMZ-Map-Book.pdf.

name: Water Districts
description: A water district is a special district given the task of supplying water and sewer needs to a community.

name: Fire Districts
description: Commissioners are elected based on district boundaries, by registered voters, within their given district; also used in determining levy rates for tax parcels within the district boundaries.

name: Cemetery Districts
description: Cemetery Board Directors are elected based on district boundaries by registered voters. District boundaries also help determine levy rates for tax parcels.

name: Rights Of Way
description: Parcel fabric parcels sublayer queried to display current lot parcels and public right-of-ways, which is parcel type 6. The layer has also been symbolized using the Lot or Unit Type field in the parcel fabric parcels attribute table. Note that there are additional types available in the Lot or Unit Type field that are not displayed in the map.

name: {{name}}
description: {{description}}

name: City Boundaries
description: City limit boundaries for the five incorporated cities within Kittitas County.  This layer includes the city limits for Ellensburg, Cle Elum, Kittitas, Roslyn and South Cle Elum.

name: Commissioner Districts
description: Representation from County Voters.  Commissioner Districts are redrawn based on census information.

name: Solar Power Overlay
description: This dataset depicts the Kittias County Solar Power Production Facilites (SPPFs) Overlay, pursuant to Kittitas County Code 17.61C. This dataset was derived in part from the Washington Department of Agriculture (WSDA) Agricultural Land Use dataset. The dataset was used to identify currently cultivated lands within Kittias County with conservation value as agricultural resources. These lands were desingated as Zone 1, where SPPFs are prohibited, and other lands within th County were designated as

name: Zoning1
description: The specific activities, minimum lot sizes, and setbacks for any designated zone may be found in the Kittitas County Code in Title 17. Project rezones may occur at any time during the year; non-project rezones must occur within the Comprehensive Plan amendment process. De-designation from resource lands (Commercial Agriculture and Commercial Forest) require a special process. This data set was generated in direct response to the Eastern Washington Growth Management Hearings Board's findings of i

name: Hospital Districts
description: Commissioners are elected based on district boundaries, by registered voters within district and also used in determining levy rates for tax parcels within the district boundaries.

name: Shoreline Master Plan
description: Washington’s Shoreline Management Act was passed by the State Legislature in 1971 and adopted by voters in 1972. The overarching goal of the Act is "to prevent the inherent harm in an uncoordinated and piecemeal development of the state’s shorelines." This data set establishes the Shoreline Environmental Designations for Kittitas County as of March 7, 2016. Details about the regulatory impact of these designations may be obtained through the Kittitas County Community Development Department.

name: Final Assessment Layer
description: Kittitas County identified all of the parcels within the “Green” and “ Yellow” zones of the Kittitas County Water Bank. The project team reviewed each subdivision within those areas to identify the project’s proposed water use and purpose based on a set of criteria identified based on the court case Campbell vs. Gwinn (March 28, 2002). The assessment for this layer was conducted using a flow chart (available upon request) based on parcel subdivision criteria , common ownership, roads, utilities,

name: Irrigation Districts
description: In the United States an irrigation district is a cooperative, self-governing public corporation set up as a subdivision of the State government, with definite geographic boundaries, organized, and having taxing power to obtain and distribute water for irrigation of lands within the district; created under the authority of a State legislature with the consent of a designated fraction of the landowners or citizens.It is a special-purpose district created by statute in order to develop large irriga

name: School Districts
description: School Board Directors are elected based on district boundaries by registered voters. District boundaries also help determine levy rates for tax parcels.

name: Wildland Urban Interface
description: The WUI mitigates damage and risk to life and property and reduces the risk of forest fires due to structure fires in hazard areas (and vice versa). Fuel reduction at the interface between natural lands and developments can reduce the intensity of the fires before they enter populated areas within the wild-land urban interface.    Research has shown that the most important factors influencing building survival during a wildfire are fire intensity, vegetation characteristics, building materials,

name: PUD Commissioner Districts
description: A public utility district that is created as provided in RCW 54.08.010 shall be a municipal corporation of the state of Washington, and the name of such public utility district shall be Public Utility District No. . . . . of . . . . . . County.The powers of the public utility district shall be exercised through a commission consisting of three members in three commissioner districts, and five members in five commissioner districts.More information can be found at the Washington State Legislature

name: Zipcode Boundaries
description: Zipcode boundaries for Kittitas County

name: Voting Precincts
description: Voting district (VTD) is a generic term adopted by the Bureau of the Census to include the wide variety of small polling areas, such as election districts, precincts, or wards, that State and local governments create for the purpose of administering elections. Some States also use groupings of these entities to define their State and local legislative districts, as well as the districts they define for election of members to the U.S. House of Representatives. In a nationwide cooperative program

name: Urban Growth Area
description: Urban growth areas are designated as part of the Comprehensive Plan process.    Alterations to an Urban Growth area must be done through the Comprehensive Plan amendment process and must be justified based on Office of Financial Management (OFM) projections for population growth and land use needs for the 20 year planning window.

name: Road Atlas Index
description: This web map provides an interactive way of downloading individual county road atlas maps by clicking on the individual grid tiles.  You can also download the entire atlas, or individual pages from the Kittitas County Public Works Atlas page.

name: Roads
description: This layer is updated as new roads are added or corrections made. This layer includes all roads maintained by the County, City and State, private roads with names officially recognized by the County, and other roads on which an addressed structure is located.

name: Critical Area Aquifer Recharge
description: Critical aquifer recharge areas are areas of unconsolidated deposits within the Roslyn and Kittitas Basins, and all Group A well head protection areas, as shown on the County’s critical areas maps. Geologic data for this layer came from the USGS (the surface geology 100k GIS dataset, intended for for use in regional spatial analyses and other digital applications and for providing a framework for planning and land management and evaluating geologic hazards and resources), which was obtained by d

name: Parcel Building Characteristics (Table)
description: Building characteristics file includes three worksheets with information such as improvement type, square footage, year built and other miscellaneous improvements such as wells, septic systems etc.There are 5 files in this download:1. MiscImprovementCharacteristics.csv2. CommercialCharacteristics.csv3. ResidentialCharacteristics.csv4. T2 Quality and Conditions Key.xlsx5. schema.ini (defines the column types for each table)Instructions for Opening in Microsoft Excel: When opening this file in Mic

description:
Sales file includes sales data such as sale date, sale
price, grantor and grantee.Instructions for Opening in Microsoft Excel: When opening this file in Microsoft Excel, the ParcelNumber should be treated as a text field because parcel numbers can have leading zeros. name: Voter Precinct Index Map
description: Application used to assist the public in downloading a static PDF map for the specified voter precinct

name: Letters Of Map Change
description: This map identifies parcels which have received floodplain development permits within the unincorporated county, and approved and denied Letters of Map Change county-wide. The map also shows the location of the 100-year floodplain and floodway. The floodplain and floodway boundary are for reference only; the official map is the Flood Insurance Rate Map which is available at the Kittitas County Public Works office or http://msc.fema.gov/.

name: Kittitas County Tax Districts
description: {{description}}

name: High Powered Rifle Restricted Areas Map
description: This map identifies areas within Kittitas County that are closed to the use of high powered rifles during special or regular deer or elk high powered rifle hunting seasons. See KCC 9.20 for more information.

name: Official County Zoning Map Signed 2019
description: KCC 17.12.020 states that "The GIS zoning dataset shall be the County's "Official Zoning Map;"  This PDF is an official rendering of that data set signed by the chairman of the Board of County Commissioners in a format that allows the user to get an overview of the county's zoning designations.

name: Fire Mapping Workshop
description: Included with this download are screen cast demos, templates for fire mapping layers (layer package), the power point used during the workshop and a folder directory structure that Kittitas County uses during all fire emergency events.

name: Commissioner Dist #1 Map
description: Kittitas County Commissioner District #1 map.  This is the officially adopted boundary, revised to reflect 2010 census population numbers.

name: Voter Precincts and Commissioner Districts - Large Format
description: Downloadable large format PDF map of the Kittitas County Commissioner Districts and Voter Precincts.  The page size is 41x36.

name: Public Access Locations Kittitas County
description: {{description}}

name: Inland NW Fall Conference Spokane - 2017
description: This downloadable zip file also contains a map package of emergency management layers that Kittitas County uses during a forest fire event,

name: Building Locations
description: Yeah I know...there are tons of apps on your phone and the internet that help you get directions to places.  We just wanted to build another one to cover our bases.  This will run on any device so check it out.

name: New Solid Waste Facility Locator Map
description: {{description}}

name: Upper District Court wPrecincts
description: Downloadable PDF map showing the Kittitas County Upper District Court boundary with the Voter Precinct lines.  The print size for this map is 42x36 inches.

name: Voter Precinct Map
description: Kittitas County voter precinct boundaries.  This map represents the officially adopted boundary changes that were made to coincide with changes made to the Commissioner Districts.  Changes were made the the following precincts:Canyon, Damman, S. Ellensburg, N. Ellensburg, N. Central, Cliffdell, Manastash, Ellensburg 14, Ellensburg 4, Ellensburg 15, Ellensburg 16, Ellensburg 18, Ellensburg 3, and Ellensburg 25

name: Commissioner Dist #3 Map
description: Kittitas County Commissioner District #3 map.  This is the officially adopted boundary, revised to reflect 2010 census population numbers.

name: Commissioner Dist #2 Map
description: Kittitas County Commissioner District #2 map.  This is the officially adopted boundary, revised to reflect 2010 census population numbers.
